title: E-commerce capsule (visuals + video required) (FR)
rationale: Visual e-commerce product (fashion capsule). Agent must recommend Instagram + TikTok + carousel + video as high relevance, NOT push LinkedIn (wrong audience).
notes: Tests channel relevance for visual product + female audience heuristics.

input.raw_offer_text: Capsule Printemps 2026 — Collection limitée 7 pièces. Vestiaire minimaliste 100% coton bio, fabriqué au Portugal, en quantité limitée — précommande ouverte 14 jours.
input.target_customer: Femmes 28-45 ans, urbaines, sensibles au slow fashion, panier moyen 200-400€

must_pass: channels.best_channels does not contain 'linkedin' as primary
